arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano drops Chelsea transfer BOMBSHELL
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Renato Veiga has reportedly rejected the opportunity to leave the club on a permanent deal before the end of the January transfer window. That is according to Fabrizio Romano, who has revealed that Veiga is only interested in departing on a six-month loan deal in order to play regular football as a central defender.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea could still beat Manchester United to £42m signing even though he rejected Blues move last summer
Who is Chelsea target Mathys Tel? Signed for £25m by Bayern Munich aged 17, the forward has been mentored by Harry Kane and is dating a Miss Universe candidate
arts.sum: Tel has been a long-term target for the Blues, with the 19-year-old having been viewed as one of the best young forwards in the game, having been snapped for £25m by Bayern in 2022.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Manchester City, Chelsea v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
arts.sum: News from Tuesday’s 7.30pm GMT kick-offs and beyond Live scores | Latest table | Premier League top scorers The Manchester City players will wear black armbands tonight in tribute to the legendary Tony Book, their former captain and manager, who has died aged 90. There’s no Kyle Walker in the Man City squad. Here’s Jonathan Liew on why the career of one of England’s greatest right-backs is ripe for reappraisal. Based on media footprint alone, Walker might well be one of the most chronicled English footballers of the past decade, and largely for issues unrelated to anything he did in a defensive transition. Search the internet for this player of 93 England caps and pretty much every medal at club level and you will be deluged with various keyword-rich morsels of celebrity gossip swimming in pound signs, house prices and gigantic photos ripped from Instagram. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chalobah's transfer stance CONFIRMED amid Chelsea recall rumours
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has revealed that Trevoh Chalobah wants to remain at Selhurst Park rather than return to Chelsea this month. However, Glasner has revealed that Chalobah is keen to remain at Selhurst Park rather than return to Chelsea.
